title: Figma Design Mission
description: A spy mission to design an app screen in Figma!

scenes.speech: Design Agent! Today we design an app screen in Figma! 🎨
scenes.title: Mission: Figma Op
scenes.content: Mission: design one app screen using Figma. Three success conditions: state the purpose in one sentence, follow the 3-color rule, sign your name somewhere.

scenes.speech: Figma is a free design tool!
scenes.title: What's Figma?
scenes.content: Figma is a browser-based design tool. You can build app screens, websites, logos, posters — even with teammates simultaneously.
scenes.highlight:
Make in Figma:
- App screens
- Logos
- Posters
- Coediting

scenes.title: Place a Frame
scenes.content: Press F to select Frame, pick an iPhone or desktop size. This is the canvas for your design.
scenes.highlight:
Frame steps:
1. F key
2. Pick size
3. Place

scenes.speech: Lay out with text and shapes!
scenes.title: Add Elements
scenes.content: T for text, R for rectangle. Place a title, description, and button — and you have a basic app screen.
scenes.highlight:
Shortcuts:
T = text
R = rect
O = circle

scenes.title: Operation: Colors
scenes.content: Pick main, sub, and accent. With three colors the layout feels unified. Stuck? Try sites like Color Hunt for palettes.

scenes.title: Polish It
scenes.content: Auto Layout aligns elements automatically. Even spacing alone makes the design feel pro.
scenes.highlight:
3 polish moves:
- Align
- Equal gaps
- Auto Layout

scenes.speech: Get the share link when done!
scenes.title: Share It
scenes.content: The Share button (top right) gives a link. Show family or friends and ask for one piece of feedback.
scenes.highlight:
Share tips:
- View-only
- URL
- Ask 1 reaction

scenes.speech: Mission complete! Submit a screenshot for 500 points 🚀
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: Done means you can describe your design in a minute: who it's for and what feeling you wanted.
